session.task: Reverse agent order and add infinite scroll pagination (50 at a time)

events.reason: API already sorts by lastModified desc. Need to add offset/limit query params to API route, pagination state in page.tsx, and a Load More button in KanbanBoard.
Added offset/limit pagination to API route, pagination state (loadMore, hasMore, total) to page.tsx, and a Load More button to KanbanBoard. Agents already sorted most-recent-first from agents.ts.

Building a full Trace Explorer page with: 1) Interactive Mermaid-style DAG rendered in SVG showing decision->action flow, 2) Expandable reasoning cards per step, 3) File heatmap showing which files were touched most, 4) Session timeline with duration bars, 5) Cost/token breakdown. This replaces the basic proxy route with a rich trace detail API and a dedicated /traces page.

Built full Trace Explorer page with 3 view modes: interactive Decision Graph (SVG connectors + expandable reasoning cards), Timeline (time-offset horizontal bars), and File Heatmap (stacked read/write/create bars). Added trace detail API endpoint and a nav link from main dashboard.
